purpose: Record visible model-detail card naming evidence. LLM cards expose a 模型版本 value for DSL model.name. AIGC cards may omit 模型版本, so direct component nodes must use canvas/exported model_info.model_id selectors instead. Canvas selector availability is workspace-specific and must override public model-list assumptions.

cards.dsl_rule: Use visible_model_version as LLM node model.name.
